queries.question: List the types of specialty common to all medical centres.
queries.sql: SELECT Specialty.Type  from Medical_Center_Specialty join Specialty on Medical_Center_Specialty.Specialty_ID = Specialty.ID join Medical_Center on Medical_Center_Specialty.Medical_Center_ID = Medical_Center.ID   GROUP BY Medical_Center_Specialty.Specialty_ID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Medical_Center_Specialty.Medical_Center_ID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Medical_Center)

queries.question: For all the medical centres, list their specialty type.
queries.sql: select medical_center.name , specialty.type from Medical_Center_Specialty join Specialty on Medical_Center_Specialty.Specialty_ID = Specialty.ID join Medical_Center on Medical_Center_Specialty.Medical_Center_ID = Medical_Center.ID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?type WHERE {
  ?medical_center_specialty a :Medical_Center_Specialty .
  ?specialty a :Specialty .
  ?medical_center_specialty p:hasSpecialty ?specialty .
  ?medical_center a :Medical_Center .
  ?medical_center_specialty p:hasMedical_Center ?medical_center .
  ?medical_center p:name ?name .
  ?specialty p:Type ?type .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: List the types of speciality of every medical centre.
